name: 回南天 Damp Southern Days
short_description: A narrative-driven visual novel blending storytelling experimentation with coffee brewing:Master water flow and extraction timing to achieve the golden standard of pour-over perfection.Unlock whispered confessions from five unique characters, their secrets clinking like coffee cups.
detailed_description:
"Coffee Chronicles of the Damp Days in Southern"

When the cloying sweetness and humidity of the rainy season engulf Shrimp Town, a café owner’s whimsical decision thrusts the unsuspecting you into a pour-over coffee championship. Amid swirling steam and the dance of coffee aromas, a springtime tale of craftsmanship, friendship, and self-discovery begins to unfurl...

A narrative-driven visual novel blending storytelling experimentation with coffee brewing:

  • Master water flow and extraction timing to achieve the golden standard of pour-over perfection.

  • Drift between pixel-art nostalgia and breath-taking realism, where every frame breathes life.

  • Unlock whispered confessions from five unique characters, their secrets clinking like coffee cups.

  • Post-story "Infinite Brew" mode lets you chase perfection in an ever-evolving coffee philosophy.

Features:

  • Pixel Poetry: Deconstruct daily life with 8-bit charm, while photo-realistic snapshots freeze raw emotions.

  • Brewing Minimalism: A streamlined system demystifies pour-over rituals—no expertise required.

  • Flavor Archetypes: Six coffee preferences align with six brewing philosophies, each extraction unlocking new narrative dimensions.

  • Compact Elegance: A single ending unfolds in 20-30 minutes (30-60 mins for full completion)—shorter than your coffee break playlist.

  • Sensory Alchemy: From bean-crunch ASMR to water ripple physics, every sound textures your brew.

Perfect For:

  • Literary souls who pair konbini coffee with existential novels.

  • Office warriors collecting human stories between lunch bites.

  • Coffee connoisseurs who trace beans to their mountain origins.

  • Indie gamers curating boundary-pushing narrative experiments.

In this muggy, rain-steeped spring, your brewing temperature will sculpt the tale—whether bitterness melts into honeyed echoes, or leaves a lingering whisper in time...
